name: Coder
description: Coder provides self-hosted cloud development environments. This integration verifies employee access, audit logging, authentication methods, and employee status tracking.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Coder deployment
2. Go to Settings > Tokens (or visit /cli-auth)
3. Create a new token and copy it
4. Enter your Coder instance URL and the token below

credentialFields.label: Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Coder deployment URL, e.g. https://coder.company.com (no trailing slash)

credentialFields.label: Session Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate at your-instance/cli-auth or Settings > Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Coder users with their roles and status, verifying proper access management.

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Verifies that audit logging is active in Coder with recent entries for access review.

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that external authentication (OIDC or GitHub SSO) is enabled, delegating 2FA to the identity provider.

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies that all Coder users have proper status tracking (active, suspended, or dormant).
